name: python-api-usage
scenario: Write a Python script that uses the EVM Python API to manage environment variables programmatically. Demonstrate CRUD operations, error handling with specific exceptions, schema validation, and group management.
success_criteria: Imports from evm.manager and evm.exceptions correctly
Uses set_grouped and get_grouped for groups
Uses try-except blocks for error handling
Does not use print statements (uses logging or returns values)
anti_patterns: Using subprocess to call evm CLI instead of Python API
Catching generic Exception instead of specific exceptions
